metadata.description: T6: Cross-validated merge of T3 (signature), T4 (call-graph), T5 (git history)

definitions.HIGH: call-graph + any T3 candidate agree (same address), or call-graph + git agree
definitions.MEDIUM: call-graph only, or signature+git agree without call-graph
definitions.CONFLICT: call-graph disagrees with top signature (sig conf>=0.5) or git

metadata.agreement_note: For call-graph+signature, ALL T3 candidates checked, not just top.
